traits.summary: Bonus Action Dash and gain temporary hit points equal to proficiency bonus.
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, you can take the Dash action and gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

mechanics.scalingNote: Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per Long Rest.

traits.summary: You can see in dim light and darkness out to 120 feet.
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.summary: You count as one size larger for carrying and pushing.
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

traits.summary: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, drop to 1 HP instead.
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

flavorText: Orcs are relentless survivors with fierce energy and deeply rooted communal bonds. Their stories often celebrate endurance, courage, and decisive action in crisis. Many channel intense emotion into leadership, artistry, or martial mastery.
roleplayNotes: Decide what your character fights for and how their drive shows up outside of combat.
